mxCell.value: PERSON_IS_ACTIVE: BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE
ADMIN_STARTED_AT: TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
UPDATED_AT: TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
